# steam-mcp
> MCP server for Valve Steam — portmanteau tools, prefab cards, hybrid LLM chat, Tauri native shell. v0.3.1 · ports 11020/11021.

## Docs
- [Readme](README.md): Quick start, tools, architecture
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [Agents](AGENTS.md): Agent context for Codex/Cursor
- [Skill](src/steam_mcp/skills/steam-mcp/SKILL.md): Workflow skill for MCP hosts
- [Native](native/README.md): Tauri desktop wrapper
- [Install](install-mcp.ps1): MCP client installer script

## Discovery
- Well-known: http://127.0.0.1:11020/.well-known/mcp/manifest.json
- Capabilities: http://127.0.0.1:11020/api/capabilities

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python dependencies (FastMCP 3.2, prefab-ui)
- [Manifest](manifest.json): MCPB Claude Desktop bundle
- [Webapp package](webapp/package.json): React dashboard

## Fleet
- Ports: mcp-central-docs/operations/WEBAPP_PORTS.md (11020/11021)
- Project doc: mcp-central-docs/projects/steam-mcp/README.md
